nasb.text: Then he said, “This is Wickedness!” And he threw her down into the middle of the ephah and cast the lead weight on its opening.

esv.text: And he said, “This is Wickedness.” And he thrust her back into the basket, and thrust down the leaden weight on its opening.

cnv.text: 天使說：“這是罪惡。”然後他把那婦人擲回量器中，又把那鉛蓋丟在量器的口上。

ccb.text: 天使说：“这是罪恶。”他把女子推回量器中，盖上铅盖。
